title: bellis perennis f. disciformis
intro: Bellis perennis f. disciformis, also known as daisy, is a specific cultivar of the common daisy plant, characterized by its distinctive disc-shaped flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations, wounds, and minor infections. The health benefits of Bellis perennis f. disciformis include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and creams that can be applied topically to the skin, or taken internally in moderation under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
